Discover Opportunities

To Transform Healthcare

Kindly send an email mentioning your Name, Contact Number, Job Position along with your resume attached to

PMT_2026-27-001 : Electrical testing Engineer

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-001

Job Position : 10

Qualification : BE / B Tech / M Tech in Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering

Location : Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 0 to 3 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • PCB assembly
  • Quality Verification
  • Unit Assembly Testing
  • Check the Bill of Materials & verify it.
  • Auditing ESD checklist, Earthing.
  • Incoming Inspection of Components / Units
  • Quality check on operator
  • Repair tech
  • Final testing of UPS
  • Handling the production assembly and maintaining the Tracking Record.

PMT_2026-27-002 : Sr Software Engineer

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-002

Job Position : 4

Qualification : MCA or BE / B Tech in Computer Science / Electronics & Communication

Location : Whitefield – Bangalore / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 0 to 5 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Advanced C# programming experience
  • Strong in Object Oriented Programming
  • Dot Net Framework usage and working knowledge (Minimum Version 4.7.2)
  • Visual Studio 2017 or above
  • MS SQL – queries, studio usage and working knowledge.
  • WPF – Desktop application development

PMT_2026-27-003 : Area Sales Manager

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-003

Job Position : 6

Qualification : MBBS/BDS/B Pharma/ BE / B Tech / M Tech / ME in Bio medical Engineering / Medical Electronics / MBA / Any graduate

Location : All Over India

Experience : 6 to 9 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Manage sales and marketing for Radiotherapy or Radiology Medical Equipment.
  • Identify new market opportunities and expand the market, both locally and internationally.
  • Travel to potential clients and maintain existing relationships.
  • Conduct product presentations, demonstrations, and contract negotiations.
  • Work with cross-functional teams (Modality Specialists, Project Management, Customer Service) to offer comprehensive solutions.
  • Engage in CMEs, conferences, and self-learning to stay current with industry trends.

PMT_2026-27-004 : Biomedical Engineer- Business Development

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-004

Job Position : 6

Qualification : MBBS/BDS/B Pharma/ BE / B Tech / M Tech / ME in Bio medical Engineering / Medical Electronics / MBA / Any graduate

Location : All Over India

Experience : 0 to 3 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Strong Communication Skills
  • Knowledge of radiotherapy and radiology equipment’s and clinical use of medical devices
  • Good Team player
  • Research and identify new market opportunities in the region. Market Study and expansion of market overseas
  • Travelling to visit potential clients, establishing new, and maintaining existing, relationships with customers
  • Managing and interpreting customer requirements
  • Coordinate for technical pre-sales activities, Transfer product knowledge to customers via good written, verbal and presentation skills.
  • Product presentation/demonstration
  • Build technical relationship with prospects or existing customers
  • Provide any technical input needed for proposals
  • Participating in tender, negotiating tender and contract terms, Negotiating, and closing sales by agreeing terms and conditions
  • Self-learning and team learning on new products.
  • Participate in CME and Conferences to build product knowledge and build awareness amongst clinical fraternity
  •  Work closely with other disciplines like Modality Specialists, Project Management, Supply Chain, Project & Customer Service to give comprehensive solutions to the customer.

PMT_2026-27-005 : Embedded Firmware Engineer

Job Code : PMT_2025-26-004

Job Position : 5

Qualification : BE / B. Tech / MTech in Electronics & Communication 

Location : Whitefield – Bangalore / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 0 to 3 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Responsible for developing microcontroller drivers like UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, Ethernet using embedded C and application-level program in c for medical devices.
  • work with cross functional teams and define the requirements for the embedded systems.
  • defining test cases for the sub system against the requirements to qualify the firmware’s.
  • documenting the embedded software
  • run the static / dynamic code analysis tools and qualify against the MISRA
  • work with hardware team and support in boards bring up where embedded software driving the hardware.
  • firmware reviews and updates as per end application requirements for 8051 / ARM Cortex M series controllers
  • work with software team during integration of projects and support wherever applicable
  • developing the desktop applications using C# to test the embedded software + hardware with simple user interface.
  • work with electromechanical team in defining and selecting the suitable embedded components / electromechanical devices.

PMT_2026-27-006 : PCB Layout Engineer

Job Code : PMT_2025-26-006

Job Position : 4

Qualification : BE / B. Tech / MTech in Electronics & Communication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering

Location : Whitefield – Bangalore / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 1 to 6 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • PCB Design & Layout: Create multilayer, high-speed PCB layouts (analog / digita l/ mixed signal) while optimizing for EMI/EMC compliance.
  • Component Placement & Routing: Strategically place components and perform critical trace routing to maximize performance.
  • DFM/DFA/DFT Implementation: Apply Design for Manufacturability (DFM), Assembly (DFA), and Testability (DFT) principles to ensure high yield.
  • Document Generation: Produce Gerber files, fabrication drawings,, and assembly documentation (BOM).
  • Collaboration: Work with hardware engineers & inter departments to optimize designs.
  • Validation & Debugging: Perform PCB assembly testing, board bring-up, and troubleshooting using oscilloscopes and digital analysers

Required Technical Skills

  • CAD Tools: Proficiency in Altium Designer, Cadence Allegro, OrCAD.
  • Industry Standards: Knowledge of IPC Class 2 & 3 standards.
  • Technical Knowledge: Understanding of PCB stack-up, impedance control, and RF/wireless antenna placement.
  • Troubleshooting: Ability to debug circuits, analyse signal integrity, and use lab equipment. 

PMT_2026-27-007 : Image Processing Engineer

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-007

Job Position : 6

Qualification : BE / B Tech & ME / M Tech in Bio Medical engineering / Medical Electronics / Computer Science

Location : Whitefield – Bangalore / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 1 to 5 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Strong knowledge of Image processing concepts (experience in Medical Imaging preferred)
  • Deep understanding of machine learning and deep learning algorithms
  • Familiarity with C++ and OOP concepts
  • GPU programming experience using CUDA to optimize performance.
  • Familiarity with medical image formats (e.g., DICOM, NIfTI) and tools (e.g., ITK, SimpleITK, 3D Slicer) is a plus.

PMT_2026-27-008 : Service Engineer

Job Code : PMT_202627-008

Job Position : 6

Qualification : BE / B Tech / M Tech / ME in Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electronics & Communication Engineering

Location : Pune / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 0 to 5 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

    • Have to perform installation, validation, and commissioning of company products.
    • Have to perform troubleshooting, service, and repairs of company products.
    • Have to perform maintenance of company products.
    • Need to provide utter most technical support to customers.
    • Have to provide onsite training to the customers.
    • Need to interact with the concerned Departments to identify the RCAs.
    • Have to maintain Installation and service information in the company database.
    • Timely responses and professionally handle field service calls and issues arising from the field service visits.
    • Proper submission of all required paperwork in time.
    • Communicate with the customer to ensure satisfaction and implement any necessary corrective actions.
    • Working knowledge and ability to test and troubleshoot electrical analog and digital circuits.
    • Good Communication skills and punctual at work.
    • Ready to travel both Domestic and International.
    • Technical Knowledge (Electrical and Electronics)

PMT_2026-27-009 : Technical Support Engineer

Job Code : PMT_202627-009

Job Position : 6

Qualification : BE / B Tech / M Tech / ME in Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electronics & Communication Engineering

Location : Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 0 to 5 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

Installation Coordination

  • Plan and coordinate installation activities for all products.
  • Track machine dispatch and arrange pending materials required for installation.
  • Coordinate with customers for project planning and installation reviews.
  • Follow up on regulatory requirements for successful project completion.
  • Plan customer training and support project handover activities.
  • Coordinate with internal departments for project reviews and updates.
  • Prepare installation reports and perform basic data analysis.

Service & Maintenance Coordination

  • Plan service visits and preventive maintenance activities.
  • Maintain records and documentation of service calls and customer complaints.
  • Analyze service data and support root cause analysis (RCA).
  • Coordinate with departments for issue resolution and corrective actions.
  • Manage material requirements and track pending activities.
  • Raise customer complaints and feedback internally and follow up until closure.
  • Conduct customer surveys and support post-market surveillance activities.
  • Maintain proper documentation related to service and maintenance activities.

PMT_2026-28-010 : Quality Control Engineer

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-010

Job Position : 5

Qualification : Dip / B. E / B Tech – Mechanical

Location : Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 2 to 5 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Polywords Software & Portable Arms : Operate for 3D measurement and inspection.
  • VMM Rapid-I : Use Video Measuring Machine for precise dimensional checks.
  • CMM Programming & Operation : Program and operate CMMs to measure complex parts.
  • Calibration & Accuracy : Perform CMM calibration and verify equipment accuracy.
  • Non-Conformity Reporting : Detect and document any measurement discrepancies.
  • Product Inspection : Inspect incoming, in-process, and final products for quality.
  • Precision Tools : Use micrometres, calipers, height gauges, etc., for measurements.
  • Root Cause & CAPA : Participate in root cause analysis and corrective actions.
  • Team Collaboration : Work with production and engineering for accurate measurements.
  • Attention to Detail : Identify even small deviations from specifications.
  • Problem Solving : Troubleshoot and resolve measurement-related issues.
  • Communication : Maintain clear verbal and written communication.

PMT_2026-27-011 : VMC & CNC Turning Programmer

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-011

Job Position : 5

Qualification : Dip / B. E / B Tech – Mechanical

Location : Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 2 to 5 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

  • Programming of VMV & CNC turning by DELCAM & FEATURE CAM respectively.
  • Knowledge on CNC & VMC Fanuc controller 3-axis machines to guide the operator.
  • Develop basic Fixtures / clamping / set up plan for part.
  • Supervise CNC (Lathe) and VMC Machine
  • Plan machining activity sequence to reduce turnaround time for jobs.
  • Look after the regular upkeep of CNC and VMC machines
  • Needs to have knowledge of different tooling used in CNC and VMC machines.
  • Needs to have knowledge of the sequence of different machining operations.
  • Needs to have 2-3 years’ experience in CNC and VMC machining and programming.
  • Should be ready to work in shifts.

PMT_2026-27-012 : Radiation Therapy Technologist

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-012

Job Position : 5

Qualification : BSC Radiotherapy Technology

Location : Whitefield – Bangalore / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : 1 to 6 years

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

Application & Product Development

  • Define product specifications based on market needs and customer requirements.
  • Assess usability and relevance of products in real-world applications.
  • Conduct validation studies to ensure product performance meets expectations.
  • Collaborate with R&D and engineering teams to refine product features.

Sales & Marketing

  • Promote products through targeted marketing campaigns and customer engagement.
  • Support sales teams with technical expertise and application insights.
  • Develop product positioning and messaging that resonates with target audiences.

Customer Engagement & Feedback

  • Gather and analyze user reviews and feedback.
  • Translate customer insights into actionable product improvements.
  • Ensure continuous product enhancement through iterative revisions.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Work closely with marketing, sales, and product development teams.
  • Provide training and application support to internal teams and customers.
  • Act as the voice of the customer within the organization.

PMT_2026-27-013 : Financial Controller

Job Code : PMT_2026-27-013

Job Position : 1

Qualification : CA

Location : Whitefield – Bangalore / Malur (Kolar District) 25 Km from Bangalore

Experience : Post CA 2.5 Years in financial planning & analysis and significant experience in Accounting, Finance, Commercial & taxation roles.

Job Function, Key Responsibilities and Duties :

Accountabilities

  • Proactive management of the P&L, in partnership with the Founders and Commercial teams.
  • Lead the core Business Performance & Analysis (BPA) processes (management reporting, budgeting & forecasting, resource allocation, margin expansion initiatives).
  • Act as the strategic and operational business partner to leadership team providing financial and business decision support with data-based insights & analytics.
  • Build business cases and drive alignment of key financial assumptions for resource allocation and prioritization of projects.
  • Monitor and manage gross margin initiatives such as pricing as well as Cost budgets including resource allocation and ROI on investments.
  • Develop financial strategies to support sound Top line and Profit Protection Plan.
  • Identify, raise and resolve key business/financial issues. Support timely, fact-based decision making within the company and the business unit.
  • Work with Commercial teams to structure pricing, evaluate financing options for customers keeping tax and compliance requirements.
  • Monitor working capital management, cash flows and drive AR collections.
  • Provide leadership, coaching & feedback to associates whether through direct line or matrix reporting line.
  • As Country Management Team members provide support & sponsor initiatives to build & enhance enterprise culture and country initiatives.
  • Audits.
  • Competitive strategic plans and annual profit plans.

We use cookies on our website to give you the most relevant experience by remembering your preferences and repeat visits. By clicking “ACCEPT ALL”, you consent to the use of ALL the cookies. However, you may visit "Cookie Settings" to provide a controlled consent.
Cookie SettingsREJECT ALLACCEPT ALL
Manage consent

Privacy Overview

We care about your privacy.

Things you should know

We may receive personal information from you based on your interaction with us on social media platforms, or if you engage with our product information

  • Social Media: If you engage with our social media accounts, such as Twitter, Facebook and LinkedIn, we may receive personal information about you. If you use these networks, their privacy policies apply, and you are encouraged to read them.


The social sharing buttons on Panacea websites are designed not to share data with the social media provider until you specifically click the button.

  • Job, Intern, Grant & Fellow Applicants: Applicants for employment, internship, grant, or fellowship opportunities with Panacea are required to give us a name, street address, telephone number, email address, and resume, and sometimes additional information as well. We use this information to process and evaluate applications and to communicate with applicants about opportunities.

  • Product information: Whenever your try to download our Product brochures we may use cookies, device information, and IP addresses for functionality and to better understand user interaction with our website

  • Product & Policy Campaigns: Some of our webpages host product or policy campaigns. For example, you can request a link by email or SMS to install Firefox on your mobile device or petition your legislators on internet issues. We may use third parties to manage these campaigns and handle any data that you choose to submit.


We use cookies, device information, and IP addresses for functionality and to better understand user interaction with our products, services, and communications.

Functionality: We may use information such as cookies, device information, and IP addresses to enhance functionality of certain products, services, and communications. For example:

We use cookies so that we can recommend relevant features and Add-ons to you based on your requirements.

We use IP addresses to customize communications by language and country.

We use certain device information such as country, language, operator and OEM, to customize your experience.

Metrics: We may also use cookies, device information, and IP addresses to help us understand in the aggregate how users engage with our products, services, communications, websites, online campaigns and other platforms.
Necessary
Always Enabled
Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information.
Non-necessary
Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website.
SAVE & ACCEPT
